title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: Employees can enroll in health insurance and dental options during the annual open enrollment period, which typically occurs in November. To begin the enrollment process, log into the employee benefits portal using your company credentials. You will find detailed information about the available health and dental plans, including coverage options and costs. If you miss the open enrollment period, you may still enroll or make changes if you experience a qualifying life event, such as marriage, birth of a child, or loss of other coverage. In such cases, you must notify HR within 30 days of the event. For assistance, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234. Remember to review your options carefully and ensure you complete your enrollment before the deadline to avoid any gaps in coverage.
